name: White Cliff Minerals Limited
analysis: WCN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 21% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$0.0190. Trade idea: entry A$0.0220, stop A$0.0129, target A$0.0494 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
